notes: Agent creates three todo items via TaskCreate and walks each to completed via TaskUpdate within a single session — no subagents. The phase DSL covers the ready → working → ready arc; the task-list assertion (the items surface in the session API's tasks field with matching subjects and status) isn't expressible in the phase DSL and is pinned by the replay byte-identity golden's summary.tasks instead. SubagentCount stays 0; no child sessions appear.

invariants: no state_transition to waiting for session
text: Session stays working across the TaskCreate/TaskUpdate calls — task-list tools are auto-executed, so no permission gate fires
Turn completes back to ready; no child sessions were spawned
